title: knautia arvensis f. calycina
intro: Knautia arvensis f. calycina, also known as field scabious, is a flowering plant that belongs to the valerian family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. It is said to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, soothing digestive problems, and reducing inflammation. Field scabious can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, and it is also used in some skincare products due to its antiseptic properties.
